organization.name: Arkansas Civic Education Initiative
organization.description: Independent civic education organization — not affiliated with or supportive of the Citizens United decision.

platform.name: The Citizens United Education Platform
platform.tagline: Citizens United civic education — Understand → Teach → Lead
platform.subject: Citizens United v. FEC and campaign finance
platform.note: Citizens United names the subject of education, not the identity of the organization.

coalition_system.name: ACEI Coalition System
coalition_system.legacy_note: Formerly Arkansas Citizens United Coalition Operating System — renamed to avoid endorsement ambiguity.
